D

DashboardController - Class in client.view
Dashboard: a role-aware overview that greets the logged-in actor, shows a few real summary cards plus an attention line, and offers a quick-link launchpad.
DashboardController(NetworkService, Session, Navigator) - Constructor for class client.view.DashboardController
 
DBConnection - Class in server.db
Manages the connection to the system's MySQL database.
DBConnection() - Constructor for class server.db.DBConnection
 
decide(int, ChangeStatus, int) - Method in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Records a decision (approve/reject) on a request, stamping decided_by and decided_at.
dispatch(ServerEvent) - Method in class client.net.EventBus
Looks up the subscriber list for the event's (entity, entityId) pair and fan-outs to each callback via Platform.runLater(java.lang.Runnable).
DomainController - Interface in server.control
A handler for one domain's slice of the server's request space (orders, reservations, parks, …).
DotEnv - Class in server.db
 
DotEnv() - Constructor for class server.db.DotEnv
